title: AstraZeneca India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: AstraZeneca India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India:
AstraZeneca India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India!
